title: lepachys columnaris
intro: Lepachys columnaris, also known as Indian pennywort or thyme-leafed glycine, is a type of perennial herb native to various regions of the world, including India and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepachys columnaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and lower blood pressure. Lepachys columnaris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in various herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
